title: Only one WITHOUT the 802 KB nested archive; Build 02 scope
public_claim: Red Team Build 02 is a scoped implementation handoff for the RedTeamLabRoom source file and durable analytical spine.
distinctive_mechanism: It preserves Build 02 scope, RedTeamLabRoom.tsx implementation notes, durable analytical spine logic, and the line between handoff-complete and implementation-complete so later work does not overstate what was verified.
use_value: It matters because red-team software work needs explicit scope and verification state; a handoff is useful only when it does not pretend to be a finished live build.
